instruction:
Decide whether the following table appears to represent a periodic function. If so enter the value of its period in the blank. If the table does not appear to be periodic enter NONE.
$\begin{array}{ccccccccc}\hline x & 0 & 4 & 8 & 12 & 16 & 20 & 24 & 28 \\\hline g(x) & 0.6 & 7.9 &-0.9 & 0.6 & 7.9 &-0.9 & 0.6 & 7.9 \\\hline\end{array}$
The period is [ANS] (Enter NONE if not periodic.)
